rationale: Bug hunt cycle on 4 files modified in cycle 7 (PSX retro shader). Following feature→bug hunt alternation. Found 1 CRITICAL (forest destroying autoload children), 3 HIGH (wrong time labels, premature night, wrong store ref), 2 MEDIUM (shader param mismatches). All 6 fixed and verified.
next_cycle_plan: Feature cycle: PROTECT effect implementation (bible v2.4 section 8 — Ogham protection shields), or core loop playtest (TEST-PLAYTEST-1), or MOS convergence system implementation.
